description: Datapoint master schema ktm-telemetry service in bCCU

datapoints.name: TimeSync
datapoints.description: Time Synchronization between bCCU and App

datapoints.name: bleSchemaVersion
datapoints.description: The schema version of the master.json schema on the CCU which defines the BLE interface. Format: 00.00. The minor number changes when descriptions or formatting changes, everything else shall be treated as a major change.

datatypes.description: Floats are represented according to IEE754
This datatype holds a single ASCII character.
This datatype is a placeholder for above mentioned datatypes.

attribute.name: READABLE
attribute.description: Indicates that this datapoint can be fetched using the getValue operation

attribute.name: WRITEABLE
attribute.description: Indicates that this datapoint cant be written using the setValue operation

attribute.name: LOGGABLE
attribute.description: Indicates that this datapoint can be logged

attribute.name: TELEMETRYABLE
attribute.description: Indicates that this datapoint can be configured to be sent as telemetry

attribute.name: NOTIFYABLE
attribute.description: Indicates that if this datapoint changes a notification will be sent

opcodes.name: getValue
opcodes.description: This procedure queries a single data point

returns.name: datapointId
returns.description: Returns the ID of the datapoint.

returns.name: value
returns.description: Returns the value of the data point.

params.name: dataPointId
params.description: The ID of the datapoint the caller wants to get the value for. [CCU-2.1 - Placeholder - NOP]

errorcodes.name: GET_VALUE_READWRITEMISSMATCH
errorcodes.description: The caller wants to write a datapoint specified as read-only. Or the caller wants to read a value which is defined as write-only.

opcodes.name: setValue
opcodes.description: This procedure sets a single data point. [CCU-2.1 - Placeholder - NOP]

errorcodes.name: SET_VALUE_NULLPOINTER
errorcodes.description: The format of the value to set is not compatible with the datatype of the corresponding datapoint.

errorcodes.name: SET_VALUE_READWRITEMISSMATCH
errorcodes.description: The caller wants to write a datapoint specified as read-only. Or the caller wants to read a value which is defined as write-only.

errorcodes.name: SET_VALUE_SIZEMISSMATCH
errorcodes.description: The sent length and the specified length do not align.

opcodes.name: telemetryConfigure
opcodes.description: Subscribe to telemetry for one datapoint.

params.name: dataPointId
params.description: The ID of the datapoint and the sampling rate it should be sent with. Encoded as a DATA_PDU.

params.name: sampleRate
params.description: Defines the interval of the datapoint to be sent.

errorcodes.name: TELEMETRY_CONFIGURE_INVALID_SAMPLERATE
errorcodes.description: The sampling rate for a datapoint is invalid

errorcodes.name: TELEMETRY_CONFIGURE_SERVICE_RUNNING
errorcodes.description: Data points cannot be configured during service runtime

errorcodes.name: TELEMETRY_CONFIGURE_DP_NOT_AVAILABLE
errorcodes.description: The datapoint is currently not available

errorcodes.name: TELEMETRY_CONFIGURE_TIME_SYNC_FAILURE
errorcodes.description: Previous time synchronisation failed, no further processing possible

notifications.name: telemetryData
notifications.description: Telemetry data. Several triples can be found in one message. This notification can be dynamically concatenated

params.name: systemTimeStamp
params.description: The timestamp in UNIX-Format - milliseconds since epoch UTC/GMT.

params.name: value
params.description: The value of the data point.
